text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I placed... That's good enough for the time being
not to tarnish my family name.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: All the same, we fell just short of victory.
choice_data_list: Even placing is quite an achievement.
Even placing is quite an achievement.
Let's use this momentum for next time!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: All the same, we fell just short of victory.
choice_data_list: Even placing is quite an achievement.
Even placing is quite an achievement.
Let's use this momentum for next time!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But our dream is even bigger than this. I'm going
to get even better!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Right! If we work together, we can win next time!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's strategize when we get back! I'd like to take
a closer look at my weaknesses!
